Results-driven Digital Marketing professional based in Dubai, certified in Google Ads, Meta Ads, and SEO (KHDA approved). Hands-on experience building and optimising campaigns across search and social platforms — from keyword research and on-page SEO to full Meta Ads campaign setup and performance analysis. Eager to contribute to a Dubai agency or brand team as a junior SEO, Paid Ads, or Social Media specialist.
